text_excerpt: Campaigns | Richard Holden Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Richard News Have Your Say Parliament Contact Richard Helpful Contacts Campaigns Should u16s be allowed on social media? Protection for Children & Freedom for Adults. Social Media access for under 16s. Kemi Badenoch has absolutely hit the nail on the head with this policy... Cut my bills Labour promised to cut your energy bills by £300, but they’ve gone up by almost £200. Urge Labour to back our Cheap Power Plan which would cut everyone’s... Say No to Starmer's ID Labour's “Digital ID” gimmick won't stop the boats. It's a desperate distraction from their scandals. We won't back any system that makes ID mandatory for... Scrap Stamp Duty on main homes Sign our petition urging Labour to scrap Stamp Duty on main homes.
